description: Build Shapely Point geometries from lat/lon columns. Drop-in for Alteryx's Create Points tool.

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame containing the lat/lon columns

outputs.description: Original columns plus geometry_column of Shapely Points

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame

geometry_column.label: Geometry Column
geometry_column.description: Output column name for the Shapely Point geometries

crs.label: CRS
crs.description: Coordinate reference system the lat/lon values are in. Defaults to WGS84.

drop_invalid.label: Drop Invalid
drop_invalid.description: Drop rows where lat or lon is NaN / non-numeric
